mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_template ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_template (name, description, content, icon, category, user_id, is_system, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{content}, #{icon}, #{category}, #{userId}, #{isSystem}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_template WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM kb_template WHERE is_system = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
